title: Tangy Turkish Shrimp Pilaf
description: A spicy and crunchy Turkish dish featuring shrimp paste, en-croute, and kosher-friendly ingredients, perfect for meal prep
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the shrimp paste, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the uncooked white rice and stir to coat the rice with the shrimp paste mixture.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
While the rice is cooking, slice the pita bread into 1-inch pieces and toast until crispy.
To assemble the en-croute, place a portion of the cooked rice mixture onto a piece of toasted pita bread and serve.
